text.transcription: 民國六四歲次乙卯桂月吉

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok lio̍k sù suè 次 乙 mauh kuì Gua̍t kiat
man4 gwok3 luk6 sei3/si3 seoi3 ci3 jyut3/jyut6 maau5 gwai3 jyut6 gat1
mínguó liù sì suì cì yǐ mǎo guì yuè jí

trans.div: In the 64th year of the Republic of China, Yi Mao Gui Yue Ji

transliterations.transliteration: 𩔰 tsóo pí 許 mn̂g Lī Tōng sī sú bōng
𩔰zou2 bei2 heoi2 mun4 leoi5 si6/zi1 cyu5/syu5 mou6
𩔰zǔ bǐ xǔ mén lǚ shì shǔ mù

trans.div: 𩔰The tomb of Xu Men, the Lu family

names.name: 將高陽雕刻當許氏的堂號
carving an expression of political loyalty
